articles.title: Sam Kennedy says Red Sox looking to add bat ‘earlier than ever’
articles.description:
“There’s been conversations going on earlier than ever before on that front.”

The post Sam Kennedy says Red Sox looking to add bat ‘earlier than ever’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sam Kennedy announces Red Sox aim to acquire a new bat this offseason.
Discussions about player additions are happening earlier than previous years.
Boston fans can expect roster changes to enhance team performance for 2024.

articles.title: Mock draft predicts Red Sox will select Bishop Feehan star in first round
articles.description:
"Leaning into the 'don’t miss the guy in your own backyard' idea here," MLB.com's Jonathan Mayo wrote.

The post Mock draft predicts Red Sox will select Bishop Feehan star in first round appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox may select Brody Bumila from Bishop Feehan in the first round of the draft.
MLB's Jonathan Mayo emphasizes local talent, suggesting teams should not overlook nearby prospects.
Selecting Bumila could energize local fans and strengthen community ties to the team.

articles.title: Red Sox’ Trevor Story undergoes sports hernia surgery
articles.description:
Story said last week his recovery time could be between 6-10 weeks.

The post Red Sox’ Trevor Story undergoes sports hernia surgery appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox player Trevor Story underwent sports hernia surgery on May 22, 2026.
Story estimates a recovery time of 6-10 weeks, affecting his availability for upcoming games.
Fans may see a significant impact on the team's performance during Story's absence.
